title: Piptanthocereus dayamii

taxonomy: Piptanthocereus dayamii is classified within the family Cactaceae. This species belongs to the subfamily Pereskioideae. Further classification places Piptanthocereus dayamii in the tribe Pereskieae. It is native to the Indian subcontinent. Piptanthocereus dayamii is a species of flowering plant.
